title: centaurium minus var. transiens
intro: Centaurium minus var. transiens, also known as lesser centaury, is a subspecies of the Centaurium minus plant, a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurium minus var. transiens include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant often come in the form of dried flowers, teas, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
